message:
feat(shared): add tRPC and WebSocket codegen

- Add tRPC codegen (trpc.ts):
  - Generate procedures from command registry
  - Automatic query/mutation classification based on method + safe flag
  - Generate nested router structure grouped by category
  - Type-safe procedure definitions
- Add WebSocket codegen (websocket.ts):
  - Generate event types from command ws bindings
  - Create TypeScript event interfaces
  - Track subscribable events
  - Generate WsEvent union type
- Fix strict TypeScript checks in codegen tests

Part of flywheel_gateway-2kf (Command Registry + Codegen System)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
